title: Fiscal 2021 Earnings Highlights
text: HIVE Blockchain reported strong financial performance for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2021. The company generated $66.7 million in digital currency mining revenue with a gross margin of $50.1 million. During this period, the organization mined 595 Bitcoin and over 96,300 Ethereum. The company achieved notable profitability, earning $42.5 million in net income while accumulating $57.5 million in digital currency assets. Working capital expanded significantly by $86.6 million throughout the fiscal year. Executive Chairman Frank Holmes emphasized the volatile nature of cryptocurrency investments, noting that despite risks, HIVE's stock delivered impressive returns—outperforming both Bitcoin and Ethereum with an 863% return over a twelve-month period ending August 31, 2021. HIVE maintained substantial crypto reserves, surpassing 1,000 Bitcoin while holding over 25,000 Ethereum. The company also announced construction progress on its New Brunswick data center campus, which will utilize hydroelectric power for Bitcoin mining operations.
